title: CV Company Context Web Research
summary: Web-researched context for companies and institutions named across Joz CV material, used to explain their sector, scale, and why they strengthen Joz credibility.

verification.notes: Compiled from web search. Some entities remain ambiguous and are intentionally flagged for review.

claims: The CV includes work across major banking, insurance, media, technology, agency, hospitality, and consumer-goods environments.
Several named companies represent global or regional enterprise-scale environments rather than small local brands.
Some entities from the CV still require higher-confidence source resolution before being treated as fully verified company context.
proof_points: Maybank is one of Southeast Asia's major banking groups.
Manulife is a large multinational insurance and financial services company.
Mediacorp is Singapore's state-owned media group.
Ogilvy and Leo Burnett are major global agency networks linked to WPP and Publicis respectively.
P&G, Samsung, Apple, and Pixar provide major global enterprise context.
